author: agupta
message: Refactor sort field mapping in query_builder for clarity

author: mchen
message: Add category filter support to query_builder
diff:
--- a/search/query_builder.py
+++ b/search/query_builder.py
@@ -20,7 +20,10 @@ def build_query(term, sort_by, category=None):
     field = SORT_FIELD_MAP[sort_by]
-    return {"term": term, "sort": field}
+    query = {"term": term, "sort": field}
+    if category is not None:
+        query["category"] = category
+    return query

author: jsmith
diff:
--- a/search/analytics.py
+++ b/search/analytics.py
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ def log_search(term):
+    metrics.increment("search.query")
     logger.info("search", term=term)
